extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows, yielding 1 criminal proceeding against the subsidiary, 0 against the Company, directors, promoters and group companies, 0 statutory/regulatory proceedings across all against rows, and 3 tax proceedings against the Company plus 0 against the subsidiary; all “By” rows were excluded, and promoter/director personal tax matters were excluded from the tax count. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiary is ₹32.44 million from the “Against the Company” row; the subsidiary amount is Nil, while the Company’s “By” amount of ₹97.98 million was excluded. Contingent liabilities are stated as ₹796.02 million as at March 31, 2025 in the risk disclosure; this is the stated aggregate of the table totals and was not re-summed. The concentration percentages disclosed are segment-level EPC Infra government-project revenue percentages for Fiscal 2025, Fiscal 2024 and Fiscal 2023, not company-wide top-customer concentration; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer percentage is disclosed. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹32.44 million = ₹3.244 crore and ₹796.02 million = ₹79.602 crore.
